keywords: debounce subflow audit record compound key enforcement not constraint narrative note
ironRules: debounce key is COMPOUND: tenantId + userId — single userId key contaminates cross-tenant
window duration from FREEDOM config — enforcement rule is MACHINE
debounce store unavailable → DataProcessResult.failure — never silent pass-through
discarded events are RECORDED in persistent store — not logged to application logs
D2 is READ-ONLY — it returns existing profile, never creates one
